org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow
Class Callflow

java.lang.Object
  org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bye, Cancel, InitialInvite, Passthru, ProxyBye, ProxyBye, ProxyCancel, ProxyCancel, ProxyInvite, ProxyInvite, ProxyInvite, ProxyPassthru, ProxyPassthru, ProxyReinvite, ProxyReinvite, Reinvite
public abstract class Callflow
extends Object
implements Serializable

static SipServletRequest copyHeaders(SipServletRequest copyFrom, SipServletRequest copyTo)
          Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER requests.
static SipServletResponse copyHeaders(SipServletResponse copyFrom, SipServletResponse copyTo)
          Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER responses, 3xx and 485 responses, and 200/OPTIONS responses.

provisional

public static boolean provisional(SipServletResponse response)

redirection

failure

public static boolean failure(SipServletResponse response)

pullCallback

public static Callback<SipServletRequest> pullCallback(SipServletRequest request)
Not to be called by the end user. This method finds the callback method associated with either the SipSession or SipApplicationSession. Special logic is in place to not clear the callback if the request is a NOTIFY with a sipfrag of less that 200.

Parameters:
request -
Returns:
the callback method

pullCallback

public static Callback<SipServletResponse> pullCallback(SipServletResponse response)

sendRequest

public void sendRequest(SipServletRequest request,
                        Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction)
                 throws ServletException,
                        IOException
Sends a SipServletRequest object. Supplies a SipServletResponse object to the user as part of the lambda function.

Parameters:
request -
lambdaFunction -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

sendRequest

public void sendRequest(SipServletRequest request)
                 throws ServletException,
                        IOException
Sends a SipServletRequest object. This method does not supply a SipServletResponse object to the user. (Useful for messages like ACK or INFO.)

Parameters:
request -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

sendRequestsInSerial

public void sendRequestsInSerial(long milliseconds,
                                 List<SipServletRequest> requests,
                                 Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction)
                          throws ServletException,
                                 IOException
Sends multiple requests (INVITE) in serial.

Parameters:
milliseconds - timer duration in milliseconds for each request
requests - a list of SipServletRequest objects
lambdaFunction - supplies a SipServletResponse object
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

sendRequestsInParallel

public void sendRequestsInParallel(long milliseconds,
                                   List<SipServletRequest> requests,
                                   Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction)
                            throws ServletException,
                                   IOException
Sends multiple requests (INVITE) in parallel.

Parameters:
milliseconds - timer duration in milliseconds for all requests
requests - a list of SipServletRequest objects
lambdaFunction - supplies a SipServletResponse object
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

makeReliable

public SipServletResponse makeReliable(SipServletResponse response)
Marks the response to be sent 'reliably', meaning you should expect at PRACK request.

Parameters:
response - a SipServletResponse object
Returns:
the same response as the input parameter

withholdResponse

public void withholdResponse(SipServletResponse response)
Mark the response as 'withheld' to prevent the method sendResponse() from actually sending the message. This gives the user the ability to prevent an automatically created response in the B2BUA or Proxy APIs from being sent back upstream.

Parameters:
response -

sendResponse

public void sendResponse(SipServletResponse response,
                         Callback<SipServletRequest> lambdaFunction)
                  throws ServletException,
                         IOException
Send a response back upstream and expect an ACK/PRACK.

Parameters:
response -
lambdaFunction -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

sendResponse

public void sendResponse(SipServletResponse response)
                  throws ServletException,
                         IOException
Send a response back upstream and do not expect and ACK/PRACK. If one is received, it will be absorbed by the framework without exception.

Parameters:
response -
Throws:
ServletException
IOException
